results.title: Manipur: Kuki-Zo body urges govt to remove highway blockades by Naga groups
results.description: In a statement, the Committee on Tribal Unity (CoTU) said that following joint deliberation with all civil society organisations (CSOs) of Kangpokpi, it unanimously resolved to "serve a 48-hour ultimatum", effective from Sunday midnight, for removing all blockades.

results.title: Dubai brings back 4-day work week for govt staff this summer; Fridays off for many employees
results.description: Dubai brings back 4-day work week Thousands of Dubai government employees will enjoy more flexibility at work this summer, with some eligible for a three-day weekend under the emirate’s renewed “Our Flexible Summer” initiative starting June 29.The programme, launched by the Dubai Government Human Resources Department (DGHR), will run until September 10 and introduces reduced [...] The post Dubai brings back 4-day work week for govt staff this summer; Fridays off for many employees appeared first on News7tv .

results.description: Sohail Khan put an end to the speculations and confirmed participating in Kunal Kemmu's reality show Alliance. However, he thinks that he would be out in the first week itself.

results.title: World Cup 2026: Champions Argentina not underestimating ‘very tough’ Cape Verde in R32 clash
results.description: Defending champions Argentina refuse to overlook history-making underdogs Cape Verde in the World Cup 2026 Round of 32. Read post-match insights from Lautaro Martínez and Giovani Lo Celso ahead of the July 3 clash in Miami.

results.title: Nifty faces resistance at 24,500, Sensex eyes 79,000 if rally sustains: Analysts
results.description: Mumbai, June 28, 2026 The Indian stock market ended the holiday-shortened week on a positive note, with benchmark indices extending gains for a third session out of four and the Nifty holding firmly above the key 24,000 mark. Analysts said the near-term technical outlook remains constructive, although fresh buying will be needed for the next [...] The post Nifty faces resistance at 24,500, Sensex eyes 79,000 if rally sustains: Analysts appeared first on Yes Punjab News .

results.title: Karnataka CM Shivakumar warns of ban on pan masala, gutka containing narcotic substances
results.description: Karnataka Chief Minister D K Shivakumar has vowed to ban pan masala and gutka if found laced with intoxicating substances, warning manufacturers of strict action. Addressing a conclave, he urged students and healthcare professionals to champion a drug-free state, emphasizing the growing threat of addiction among youth. The government is intensifying anti-drug measures, especially in educational institutions, to secure the nation's future.
